goal.objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 8 graph-based reranking with topology distance, ranking signals, project-scoped traversal, and regression tests

completionBudgetReport: Goal achieved. Report final usage from this tool result's structured goal fields.
